ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year for the data */,
  "period_ended" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income or starting line value */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation or depletion value */,
  "non_cash_items" REAL /* Non-cash items value */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated during the period */,
  "cost_of_goods_sold" REAL /* Cost of goods sold during the period */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses during the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_depreciation FOREIGN KEY ("depreciation") REFERENCES financial_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_net_income FOREIGN KEY ("net_income") REFERENCES financial_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_fiscal_year FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_non_cash_items FOREIGN KEY ("non_cash_items") REFERENCES financial_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Name of the fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fiscal year is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., ARS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "external_reference" TEXT /* External reference or identifier for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial type */,
  "parent_type" INTEGER /* Parent type ID, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, XLSX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., Revenue Forecast, Expense Forecast) */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Predicted value for the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to create the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_access_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasting ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_access_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed data */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
